answers: DevOps = Development + Operations. It's about automating software delivery: code, build, test, deploy, monitor. Key skills: Docker, CI/CD, cloud, and scripting.
Docker packages your app into containers - runs the same everywhere. Learn: docker build, docker run, docker-compose. It solves 'works on my machine' forever.
DevOps tools: Docker (containers), Kubernetes (orchestration), Jenkins/GitHub Actions (CI/CD), Terraform (infrastructure), and AWS/GCP/Azure (cloud).
CI/CD pipeline: every code push triggers automatic build, test, and deploy. Tools: GitHub Actions (free), Jenkins, GitLab CI. Speeds up delivery and catches bugs early.
